subcodes.first_line: O My Beloved! From the earliest days when, by reason of the dust and smoke of tyranny, day and night appeared as one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب نفسیکه از اول ایام که از غبار و دخان ظلم روز و شب یکسان مینمود امام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
